title: AI Agent receives no text input in active mode
symptom: When the workflow is active, the AI Agent outputs 'No paper text was provided'. However, it works correctly during testing.
applies_when: PDF file is copied to the designated folder
not_this_if: Workflow is tested manually without issues
root_cause: The issue arises because the variable holding the extracted text is an array when the workflow runs in active mode. This causes the AI Agent to receive an incorrect format, leading to the message indicating no text was provided.
fix_steps: Modify the prompt in the AI Agent node to join the array elements into a single string using new lines.
Update the prompt to explicitly wrap the joined text in quotes.
agent_instruction: Join the array of text into a single string and update the prompt accordingly.
